children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present in patient_data; generate a unique patient_id; store patient record in patients database; return success with patient_id

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients database

data_operations.description: Insert new patient record with generated patient_id

constraints.description: patient_data must contain name, dob, contact, insurance fields

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients database with unique patient_id

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients database; check that appointment_time is not in the past; check doctor availability for that time; create appointment record in appointments database; return success with appointment_id

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence
Read existing appointments for availability check and write new appointment record

data_operations.description: Verify patient_id exists in patients database
Check doctor availability by reading existing appointments

constraints.description: appointment_time must not be in the past
Doctor must be available at the requested time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record is created in appointments database with unique appointment_id
Patient existence is verified before booking

children.name: RetrieveMedicalRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

global_vars.description: Read medical records for the given patient_id

data_operations.description: Query records database for patient_id and sort by timestamp descending

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database

acceptance_criteria.description: All medical records for the patient are returned sorted by date descending

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields, validate insurance change against external system
children.behavior: Update patient_data fields in patients database; if insurance field is changed, validate against external system before saving; return success with updated data

global_vars.description: Read current patient record and write updated fields

data_operations.description: Read current patient record to compare fields
Write updated patient fields to database

constraints.description: Insurance change must be validated against external system before saving

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated in patients database with validated insurance change

governance_notes: Global state conservation verified: patients (read_write) covered by RegisterPatient (write), BookAppointment (read), UpdatePatientProfile (read_write). appointments (read_write) covered by BookAppointment (read_write). records (read_write) covered by RetrieveMedicalRecords (read). Note: records write operation is not assigned to any child, which is acceptable as the parent's records write requirement may be satisfied by external medical record creation processes not modeled in this decomposition.
